productDisplayName: Playboy Men Red and Black Flip Flop
description: Style NoteWhether you're hitting the sand or sticking to the sidewalk, your look is relaxed and cool with these black flip-flops from playboy. Ready to make a splash with a fully rubberized construction, the simplicity of the design makes it idea for easy dressing.   Product DetailsRed fabric thong straps with stitch detailingSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfortPlayboy bunny logo on the footbedBrand bunny face logo-styled lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesMaterial and CareRubberWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
